title: leucanthemum vulgare var. subglaucum
intro: Leucanthemum vulgare var. subglaucum, also known as the oxeye daisy, is a variety of the common daisy plant that is characterized by its blue-green leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Leucanthemum vulgare var. subglaucum include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and treating digestive issues, among others. Leucanthemum vulgare var. subglaucum can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herb for herbal remedies.
